name: Pancake and Waffle Mix
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Liquid shortening (1/2 the amount for pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients thoroughly. This mixture can be used immediately or stored in a cool place for future use.
2. When preparing, mix equal parts of the mix and milk (sour milk is recommended). For pancakes, use 1 egg per 1-2 cups of the mix. For waffles, use 1 egg per cup of the mix.
